positive: A whimsical and stylized depiction of a glowing forest lantern nestled among oversized, bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate ferns. The central composition features the lantern, casting soft, ethereal light that highlights the intricate patterns on the mushrooms' caps. Use a vector art style mixed with stained glass details, giving strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast. Color palette should be deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and warm amber glows, achieving a magical, fantastical feel. Perfect central arrangement suitable for apparel print, minimalist yet detailed, crisp linework, flat background separation.
negative: blur, sketch, text, watermark, logo, jpeg artifacts, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, signature, noise
